Operation 'addList' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is identical to the summary and lacks essential details. Added information about what the operation accepts (AddListRequest parameters), what it returns (list object with ID), and side effects (list becomes immediately available). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and consequences.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new email list in the Vision6 account. Accepts list configuration parameters via AddListRequest. Returns the newly created list object with assigned list ID and metadata. The list will be immediately available for adding contacts and sending campaigns.
data.reasoning: The current description is identical to the summary and lacks essential details. Added information about what the operation accepts (AddListRequest parameters), what it returns (list object with ID), and side effects (list becomes immediately available). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and consequences.

message: Operation 'searchLists' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too minimal. Enhanced summary to clarify the search action. Added details about input parameters (SearchRequest), output format (ListResponse with pagination), and use cases. This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Searches for email lists in the Vision6 account matching specified criteria. Accepts search parameters via SearchRequest (e.g., list name, status, date range). Returns a ListResponse containing matching lists with pagination support. Useful for discovering existing lists before performing operations like adding contacts or sending campaigns.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Enhanced summary to clarify the search action. Added details about input parameters (SearchRequest), output format (ListResponse with pagination), and use cases. This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'sendTransactionalEmail' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks context about transactional email purpose and behavior. Added clarification that these bypass list management, included input/output details, and provided examples of use cases. This helps AI agents distinguish transactional emails from campaign emails and understand when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Sends a transactional email to one or more recipients outside of marketing campaigns. Accepts email parameters via SendTransactionalEmailRequest (recipient, subject, body, etc.). Returns TransactionalResponse with delivery status and message ID. Transactional emails are sent immediately and bypass list management, suitable for order confirmations, password resets, and system notifications.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks context about transactional email purpose and behavior. Added clarification that these bypass list management, included input/output details, and provided examples of use cases. This helps AI agents distinguish transactional emails from campaign emails and understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'sendTransactionalMessage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too brief and lacks operational context. Added details about input/output parameters, clarified that SMS bypasses list management like email transactional messages, and provided relevant use cases. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to apply it.

data.description_suggestion: Sends a transactional SMS message to one or more recipients outside of marketing campaigns. Accepts message parameters via SendTransactionalMessageRequest (phone number, message content, etc.). Returns TransactionalResponse with delivery status and message ID. SMS messages are sent immediately and bypass list management, suitable for two-factor authentication, order updates, and time-sensitive notifications.
data.reasoning: Current description is too brief and lacks operational context. Added details about input/output parameters, clarified that SMS bypasses list management like email transactional messages, and provided relevant use cases. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to apply it.

message: Operation 'getCreditBalance' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Original description lacks detail about what credit information is returned and why an agent might need it. Added specifics about return values (available/used credits, credit types) and use cases (monitoring before sending). This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and how to interpret the response.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current credit balance for the authenticated Vision6 account. Accepts BaseRequest with API key authentication. Returns account credit information including available credits, used credits, and credit type (email sends, SMS messages, etc.). Use this to monitor account resources before sending campaigns or transactional messages.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what credit information is returned and why an agent might need it. Added specifics about return values (available/used credits, credit types) and use cases (monitoring before sending). This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and how to interpret the response.

message: Operation 'addContacts' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. Improved description clarifies what data is accepted, what is returned, and the side effect of contacts becoming available for campaigns. data.description_suggestion: Adds one or more contacts to a specified email list in Vision6. Accepts contact data including email addresses and optional custom fields. Returns a response indicating success or failure for each contact added. Contacts are immediately available for email campaigns after addition.
data.reasoning: Current description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. Improved description clarifies what data is accepted, what is returned, and the side effect of contacts becoming available for campaigns. This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and when to use it.

data.description_suggestion: Searches for contacts within a specified list using search criteria such as email address, name, or custom field values. Returns a collection of matching contact records with their details. Supports filtering and pagination for large result sets.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Improved version explains what search criteria are supported, what data is returned, and mentions pagination support. This enables AI agents to understand how to construct search queries and handle results effectively.

data.description_suggestion: Updates contact information for one or more existing contacts in a list. Accepts contact IDs and fields to modify such as email, name, or custom attributes. Returns confirmation of updated contacts. Changes take effect immediately for future campaign sends.

data.description_suggestion: Removes one or more contacts from a specified list. Requires contact IDs to identify which contacts to delete. Returns confirmation of deleted contacts. Deleted contacts are immediately removed from the list and excluded from future campaigns.
data.reasoning: Current description is too brief. Improved version clarifies the required input (contact IDs), the return value, and the side effect (immediate removal from campaigns). This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature of the operation and its consequences.

message: Operation 'unsubscribeContact' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks critical details. Improved version specifies required inputs (contact ID and list ID), clarifies the side effect (marked as unsubscribed but remains in list), and explains the consequence (excluded from future emails). data.description_suggestion: Unsubscribes a contact from a list, preventing them from receiving future email campaigns. Requires the contact ID and list ID. Returns confirmation of the unsubscribe action. The contact remains in the list but is marked as unsubscribed and will not receive emails.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks critical details. Improved version specifies required inputs (contact ID and list ID), clarifies the side effect (marked as unsubscribed but remains in list), and explains the consequence (excluded from future emails). data.description_suggestion: Creates a new email list in the Vision6 account. Accepts list configuration parameters including name and other list properties via AddListRequest. Returns the newly created list object with assigned list ID and metadata. The list is immediately available for adding contacts and sending campaigns.
data.reasoning: The current description is identical to the summary and lacks essential details. message: Operation 'sendTransactionalEmail' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks context about transactional email purpose, input requirements, return value, and delivery behavior. Added clarification that this is for non-campaign emails, specified the request/response schemas, and explained the delivery and tracking behavior. This helps AI agents distinguish transactional emails from campaign operations.

data.description_suggestion: Sends a transactional email to specified recipients outside of marketing campaigns. Accepts email parameters via SendTransactionalEmailRequest including recipient address, subject, content, and sender information. Returns a TransactionalResponse with delivery status and message ID. Email is queued for immediate delivery and tracked separately from campaign emails.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks context about transactional email purpose, input requirements, return value, and delivery behavior. Added clarification that this is for non-campaign emails, specified the request/response schemas, and explained the delivery and tracking behavior. This helps AI agents distinguish transactional emails from campaign operations.

data.description_suggestion: Sends a transactional SMS message to specified phone numbers outside of marketing campaigns. Credits are used for transactional emails and SMS messages.
